critical_blockers.title: Hardcoded Database Password in .env
critical_blockers.description: Database password 'JHSalonAdmin123' is hardcoded in backend/.env and backend/.env.bak_20260313
critical_blockers.impact: If .env is committed to git, attackers can extract credentials from git history. Database is exposed on internal IP 34.29.171.92
critical_blockers.remediation:
1. Remove .env and .env.bak from git history (git filter-branch or BFG Repo-Cleaner)
2. Add .env to .gitignore
3. Store secrets in GCP Secret Manager
4. Use Workload Identity Federation for production

critical_blockers.title: Hardcoded API Keys in .env
critical_blockers.description: OpenRouter API key, Twilio credentials, and internal IPs exposed in .env files
critical_blockers.impact: Financial loss via API abuse, unauthorized Twilio SMS/WhatsApp sending, database compromise
critical_blockers.remediation: Rotate all exposed keys immediately. Migrate to GCP Secret Manager. Update GCP Secret Manager config to include JWT_SECRET, REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET, TWILIO_API_KEY_SECRET

critical_blockers.title: Missing JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET in .env
critical_blockers.description: JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET are not defined in backend/.env. The app will crash at runtime when trying to authenticate users
critical_blockers.impact: Application will fail to start or authenticate users. Authentication completely broken in production
critical_blockers.remediation:
1. Generate cryptographically secure secrets (32+ chars)
2. Add to GCP Secret Manager
3. Add to .env (local dev only, NOT committed)
4. Update loadSecrets() in backend/src/config/secrets.ts to include JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET

critical_blockers.title: Backup File with Secrets Committed to Repository
critical_blockers.description: backend/.env.bak_20260313 contains identical secrets and is likely committed to git
critical_blockers.impact: Secrets extractable from git history even after .env is removed. Historical exposure window
critical_blockers.remediation:
1. Remove file: rm backend/.env.bak_20260313
2. Purge from git history: bfg --delete-files .env.bak*
3. Force push if needed

high_issues.title: serialize-javascript RCE Vulnerability
high_issues.description: serialize-javascript <=7.0.2 vulnerable to RCE via RegExp.flags and Date.prototype.toISOString()
high_issues.impact: Remote Code Execution possible through malicious input processed by workbox-build

high_issues.title: esbuild Development Server Request Bypass
high_issues.description: esbuild <=0.24.2 allows any website to send requests to development server and read responses
high_issues.impact: Information disclosure if dev server is exposed. Production not affected if built with production flag

medium_issues.title: 'unsafe-inline' Allowed in CSP Style Source
medium_issues.description: Content Security Policy allows 'unsafe-inline' for styles, reducing XSS protection
medium_issues.impact: Stored XSS via style injection possible, though impact reduced by other CSP directives
medium_issues.remediation: If TailwindCSS requires inline styles, consider using 'nonce' approach or CSS-in-JS

medium_issues.title: Rate Limiter Falls Back to MemoryStore Without Redis
medium_issues.description: rateLimiter.ts creates MemoryStore when Redis is unavailable. In multi-instance deployment, each instance has independent limits
medium_issues.impact: Rate limiting can be bypassed by distributing requests across instances
medium_issues.remediation: Ensure Redis is always available in production. Add health check that fails if Redis is down

positive_findings: Auth middleware properly throws error if JWT_SECRET missing (fixed from previous audit)
SQL queries use parameterized queries ($1, $2) - SQL injection prevented
Twilio webhook validates signature using twilio.validateRequest()
Security headers configured with comprehensive Helmet policy
CORS properly configured with explicit origin validation
Rate limiting implemented for auth (10/min) and general API (100/15min)
bcrypt used for password hashing (appropriate work factor)
Refresh tokens stored in database with expiration
HSTS configured with preload and includeSubDomains

recommendations.action: Rotate all exposed secrets (API keys, Twilio credentials, DB password)
Add JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET to .env and GCP Secret Manager
Remove .env.bak_20260313 and purge from git history
Update vite-plugin-pwa to >=0.19.8 to fix serialize-javascript RCE
Update loadSecrets() to include JWT_SECRET and REFRESH_TOKEN_SECRET
Implement Workload Identity Federation to eliminate service account key files
Add fail2ban or Cloud Armor rules for DDoS protection
Review and tighten CSP directives to remove 'unsafe-inline'
